properties.sql: SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM app_fd_farmerbasicinfo) AS farmers, (SELECT count(*) FROM app_fd_parcelregistration) AS parcels, (SELECT count(*) FROM app_fd_budget_envelope WHERE c_status='active') AS programmes, (SELECT count(*) FROM app_fd_subsidy_app_2025) AS applications, (SELECT count(*) FROM app_fd_subsidy_app_2025 WHERE c_status IN ('approved','auto_approved')) AS applications_approved, (SELECT count(*) FROM app_fd_im_voucher) AS vouchers_total, (SELECT count(*) FROM app_fd_im_voucher WHERE c_status='redeemed') AS vouchers_redeemed, (SELECT COALESCE(sum(c_allocated_amount::numeric),0) FROM app_fd_budget_envelope WHERE c_status='active') AS budget_allocated, (SELECT COALESCE(sum(c_amount::numeric),0)/2 FROM app_fd_budget_event WHERE c_event_type='COMMITMENT' AND c_direction='debit') AS budget_committed, (SELECT COALESCE(sum(c_amount::numeric),0)/2 FROM app_fd_budget_event WHERE c_event_type='EXPENSE' AND c_direction='debit') AS budget_expensed
